content:
Most were forgettable. These eleven aren’t.

9 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

👉Read the full article for free here
If you’ve ever typed a prompt into Claude and got back something that looks like it was written by a LinkedIn bot who just discovered bullet points, you’re not alone.
That’s what happens when you use Claude without Skills.
Skills is a feature that lets you create reusable instruction sets so Claude follows your standards your tone, your format, your output quality. No more re-explaining yourself every session like Claude has amnesia.
I tested 200 of them so you don’t have to.
How to enable Skills:
Go to Settings → Capabilities → Turn on Skills
Then head to Preferences → Skills to browse what’s available.
To enable the built-in skill creator:

• Open preferences in the left sidebar

• Click Skills

• Select skill-creator

• Toggle it on leave it always on
Claude will now suggest and apply skills automatically based on your prompts…
